action.reasoning: Observation: iter19 achieved strong val AUC 0.7592 (new high) with early stopping at ep24 but eval failed due to missing test.pt (read-only /data, cp failed) + truncated train.py save dict in workspace (incomplete ckpt risks predict load). Best test AUC 0.7583. Analysis: Embedded DKT (LSTM on skill-correct embeds, per-skill output, masking, ES, grad clip, scheduler) is effective and stable when code is clean; higher val indicates potential for better test if ckpt complete. Persistent bugs from truncation/deprecation wasting time (13min left, ~60s/iter). Decision: Fully rewrite all 3 files clean+complete (full hparam ckpt save with all keys, no verbose arg, robust ES/scheduler/clip/jsonl-only-logging, arg parsing, exact inference+prepare matching across files); use proven params (h=1024,e=320,d=0.5,lr=1e-4,wd=1e-4,bs=48,epochs=50,es=12,sch=5). Command: rewrite+train (reuse best if possible but retrain for clean ckpt)+create /tmp test from val+run predict to validate contract+submit_eval on best_model.pt.
action.command: python train.py && mkdir -p /tmp/test_data && cp /data/val.pt /tmp/test_data/test.pt && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/test_data --checkpoint best_model.pt --output /tmp/output.json && ls -l /tmp/output.json && python -c 'import torch; ckpt=torch.load("best_model.pt", weights_only=False); print("CKPT keys:", list(ckpt.keys())); print("embed_size:", ckpt.get("embed_size"))'
